creator: jocke@gipset.se
text:
I have now tried to install and run this. In doing so I found two problems that I have now fixed in an updated patch.

I also took a shot at updating deluge to 2.0.5 which has been running fine on my machine. Have not tested either patches in the GUI though as I run a headless server.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=263214
